title: Noobnouns
description: A server sided mod that adds names and pronouns, respecting teams
body:
A server sided mod which adds customisable names and pronouns. The format is configurable in a configuration file documented on the [github](https://github.com/z3roco01/noobnouns/blob/master/README.md) page.
**You also need [Composed](https://modrinth.com/mod/composed) installed** # Commands - `/nouns name `: changes your set name, replace `` with your new name - `/nouns pronouns `: changes your set pronouns, replace `` with your new pronouns
